titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Ilya Simakov collection of the Living Theatre 2008 tour of The Brig
Simakov (Ilya) Collection of the Living Theatre 2008 tour of The Brig
titlestmt.author: by Janet Lopes

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday March 27, 2024 at 03:02

did.unittitle: Ilya Simakov collection of the Living Theatre 2008 tour of The Brig

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Boxes 1 and 2 (Audiovisual material): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 3 (Computer media): Restricted fragile. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials in this collection are organized into two series: I. Audiovisual and born-digital material, 2008. II: Flyers, programs, and other tour-related materials, 2007-2008.

bioghist.head: Ilya Simakov
bioghist.p: Ilya Simakov is a United States-based filmmaker of Russian origin, who received his Master of Fine Arts in Film and Media Arts from Temple University (2012). His professional roles have included cinematographer, gaffer, camera assistant, boom operator, producer, and editor.
During 2008, Simakov shot many hours of videotape during Living Theatre's touring production of "The Brig".

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ilya Simakov Collection of the Living Theatre 2008 Tour of The Brig. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains digital videotapes documenting the 2008 touring production of "The Brig" by Living Theatre. Also included in the collection is a compact disc, printed flyers, brochures, and pamphlets related to the tour.

Originally presented in 1963 and performed by Living Theatre, the 2007 revival of "The Brig" featured a new version written by Kenneth Brown. It depicts a typical day in a U. S. Marine Corps military prison. In 2008, the troupe's touring production traveled extensively throughout Germany and Italy and was documented by filmmaker Ilya Simakov.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Ilya Simakov collection of the Living Theatre 2008 tour of The Brig is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 1 and 2 (Audiovisual material): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 3 (Computer media): Restricted fragile. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials in this series document the 2008 touring production of "The Brig" by Living Theatre. Originally presented in 1963 and performed by Living Theatre, the 2007 revival of "The Brig" featured a new version written by Kenneth Brown. It depicts a typical day in a U. S. Marine Corps military prison. In 2008, the troupe's touring production traveled extensively throughout Germany and Italy and was documented by filmmaker Ilya Simakov.

did.unittitle: Flyers, programs, and other tour-related materials

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials maintain order found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Materials include printed flyers, brochures, and pamphlets related to the 2008 touring production of "The Brig" by Living Theatre.
